cells.note: CARRY / CASH-FLOW STUDY — delta-neutral long spot + short perp, harvesting OKX perp funding (NOT a directional price bet, NOT the rejected basis_*/xspread_* signals). Single-venue OKX over the ~92d OKX-reachable window. 'net_exp%' = mean NET carry per hold (funding + basis − four-leg fees). Excluded from the live directional allowlist by design.

verdict_reasons: harvested carry beats total cost on 2/3 symbols (mean net +19.098% per hold, funding alone clears the four-leg fee)
cells.note: CARRY / CASH-FLOW STUDY — multi-year (~5y) single-venue Binance delta-neutral carry under TAKER fees (spot 0.1% · perp 0.05% · slip 0.02% → 4 legs = 0.38% one-time). Funding from the Binance Vision archive; spot from Binance candles; the geo-blocked perp price leg is proxied by spot so the basis term is 0 and ONLY realized funding minus fees is credited (conservative funding-only read). 'net_exp%' = mean NET carry per hold. Excluded from the live directional allowlist by design.

verdict_reasons: CONDITIONAL ACCEPT — resting-MAKER fills (0 slippage + maker rate both legs); a taker execution pays the higher fees in the taker cell
harvested carry beats total cost on 2/3 symbols (mean net +19.398% per hold, funding alone clears the four-leg fee)
cells.note: CARRY / CASH-FLOW STUDY — multi-year (~5y) single-venue Binance delta-neutral carry under MAKER fees (spot 0.02% · perp 0.02% · slip 0.0% → 4 legs = 0.08% one-time). Funding from the Binance Vision archive; spot from Binance candles; the geo-blocked perp price leg is proxied by spot so the basis term is 0 and ONLY realized funding minus fees is credited (conservative funding-only read). 'net_exp%' = mean NET carry per hold. Excluded from the live directional allowlist by design. MAKER fills are an ASSUMPTION (resting limit orders may not fill); read any ACCEPT as CONDITIONAL.
